content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://doi.org/10.1093/cdn/nzz041.fs18-05-19", "source_title": "cdn.nutrition.org (403 captcha block)", "source_type": "other", "source_quality": 0.0, "overall_relevance": 0.0, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "10.1093/cdn/nzz041.fs18-05-19", "atomic_facts": [], "evidence_summary": "INSUFFICIENT_CONTENT: 403 + captcha."}, {"source_url": "https://www.emjreviews.com/general-healthcare/symposium/the-use-of-evidence-base", "source_title": "The Use of Evidence-Based Dietary Interventions for the Management of Obesity", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.5, "overall_relevance": 0.45, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "EMJ Reviews", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Lifestyle and dietary modification are central to achieving effective weight loss in obesity.", "direct_quote": "Evidence has established that lifestyle and dietary modification are central to achieving effective weight loss.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.6, "confidence": 0.92, "perspective": "Public_Health", "entities": ["lifestyle modification"]}, {"statement": "Very low calorie ketogenic diets (VLCKD) can produce sustained weight loss and in some individuals remission of type 2 diabetes.", "direct_quote": "Such regimens have been shown to result in sustained weight loss and, for some people, remission of Type 2 diabetes (T2D).", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.9, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": ["VLCKD", "T2D remission"]}, {"statement": "Obesity Canada's 5As programme structures medically-supervised weight management.", "direct_quote": "Obesity Canada's '5As' programme", "fact_category": "named_entity", "relevance_score": 0.4, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Regulatory", "entities": ["Obesity Canada", "5As"]}], "evidence_summary": "EMJ symposium review on evidence-based dietary interventions for obesity — adjacent context source."}]}
